_schema_notes.coverage: Authoritative schema for all DID formats — DD Form 1664 (pre-2014) and free-text (post-2014 MIL-STD-963C)
_schema_notes.did_format: Set to 'dd_form_1664' or 'free_text'. Determines which fields are expected to be populated.
_schema_notes.963c_compliant: True if the DID was prepared under MIL-STD-963C (2014 or later). False for older DIDs.
_schema_notes.reserved_fields: Fields marked RESERVED are present in one format but not the other. Always include them — set to empty string or empty array when not applicable.
_schema_notes.preparation_instructions: Official MIL-STD-963C name for what was previously called 'requirements'. Contains the numbered sections of the DID. All section numbers are normalized to strictly numeric dot-notation (1, 1.1, 1.1.1). Letter-based source numbering (2.a, 3.1.b) is converted to numeric equivalents (2.1, 3.1.2).
_schema_notes.asterisk: True if the requirement number is followed by * in the source document (conditional requirement).

title: BILL OF Materials (BOM) FOR Logistics AND Supply CHAIN RISK Management
summary: This DID provides the format and content for a Bill of Materials (BOM), facilitating production status tracking, DMSMS management, and supply chain risk mitigation for DoD systems, ensuring efficient information sharing.
use_relationship:
The Bill of Materials (BOM) will provide information that can be used to establish the production status of parts used in a system. The BOM will also provide Diminishing Manufacturing Sources and Material Shortages (DMSMS) management essential information that enables the identification, forecasting, mitigation, and management of Hardware and Software obsolescence as a part of the Department of Defense (DoD) Program Manager's Total System Life Cycle Management responsibilities. The data will be used in DMSMS forecasting tools to allow for standard and efficient sharing of information on common items.
The BOM will also provide logisticians and supply chain risk managers with additional data they require to ensure supportability requirements and supply chain risks are identified or mitigated during the development of a system.
This Data Item Description (DID) contains the format, content, and intended use of information for the data product resulting from the work task described by the contract.
The data may be obtained during any program life cycle phase.
distribution_statement: DISTRIBUTION STATEMENT A: Approved for public release; distribution is unlimited.

preparation_instructions.title: Format. The BOM shall be in a format similar to that of Figure 1.
Content. The BOM shall contain all of the information specified in Figure 1, with the path to the system level identified using the part/Next Higher Assembly method detailed in the table.
preparation_instructions.content:
All fields shall be included. Fields which do not require data shall be left blank. The information shall be included to the lowest indenture level (component level) specified in the contract

Field Name: OEM Part Number
Definition: The part number assigned by the Original Equipment Manufacturer (OEM). This may be the same as the Manufacturer's number but more often than not it is different. Sometimes referred to the Configuration Part Number or the Drawing Number
Notes and Instructions: Required. Referred to as the "Referenced Part" hereafter
Data Type: Alphanumeric

Field Name: OEM Name
Definition: The full legal name of the entity that is providing the referenced part to the government. Sometimes referred to as the Prime Integrator or Prime
Notes and Instructions: Required
Data Type: Alphanumeric

Field Name: OEM CAGE
Definition: Commercial and Government Entity (CAGE) code of the OEM
Notes and Instructions: Required
Data Type: Alphanumeric (5)

Field Name: OEM's Address
Definition: The physical address of the part's OEM, including country
Notes and Instructions: Required
Data Type: Alphanumeric

Field Name: OEM's Website
Definition: The web address of the part's OEM
Notes and Instructions: Required when the OEM has a website
Data Type: Alphanumeric

Field Name: OEM's Facility Clearance Level
Definition: The level of security clearance the OEM's facility holds
Notes and Instructions: Required
Data Type: Alphanumeric (None, Confidential, Secret, Top Secret)

Field Name: Revision Designator
Definition: The designator of the revision of the referenced part
Notes and Instructions: Required if assigned
Data Type: Alphanumeric

Field Name: Software / Firmware Version
Definition: The designator assigned to the version of software / firmware used on the referenced part
Notes and Instructions: Required for all parts containing software or firmware
Data Type: Alphanumeric

Field Name: Indenture Level
Definition: A number that represents the specific level of the top down structure specified on the Bill of Materials
Notes and Instructions: Starts with the top level as one
Data Type: Numeric

Field Name: Reference Designator
Definition: A reference designator identifies the referenced part. ASME Y14.44-2008 and IEEE-315-1975 provide details for the proper configuration and use of reference designators.
Notes and Instructions: Required if assigned
Data Type: Alphanumeric

Field Name: Find Number
Definition: Find number refers to the ordinal number that gives an ID tag to the referenced part in a parts list (list of materials, bill of materials).
Notes and Instructions: Required if assigned
Data Type: Alphanumeric

Field Name: NHA Part Number
Definition: The OEM Part Number of the referenced part's parent (Next Higher Assembly (NHA)). If the referenced part is software or firmware then the NHA is the item the software is used on
Notes and Instructions: Required for all parts except the top level assembly
Data Type: Alphanumeric

Field Name: NHA CAGE
Definition: CAGE code of the OEM of the NHA
Notes and Instructions: Required for all parts except the top level assembly
Data Type: Alphanumeric (5)

Field Name: Nomenclature
Definition: The name or designation of the referenced part
Notes and Instructions: Required for all parts
Data Type: Alphanumeric

Field Name: Quantity
Definition: The count of the referenced part per NHA
Notes and Instructions: Required for all parts
Data Type: Numeric

Field Name: NSN
Definition: National Stock Number (NSN) of the referenced part
Notes and Instructions: Required if item has NSN assigned
Data Type: Alphanumeric

Field Name: COG
Definition: Cognizance (COG) Code: A two-part alphanumeric designator used by the Navy to provide supply management information
Notes and Instructions: Required if assigned
Data Type: Alphanumeric

Field Name: Manufacturer's Part Number
Definition: The part number assigned by the actual manufacturer of the referenced item. This number will be used to monitor the part for obsolescence issues
Notes and Instructions: Required (may be the same as the referenced part if the part is manufactured by the OEM)
Data Type: Alphanumeric

Field Name: Manufacturer's Name
Definition: The full legal name of the entity that actually manufacturers the referenced part
Notes and Instructions: Required
Data Type: Alphanumeric

Field Name: Manufacturer's CAGE
Definition: The CAGE code of the entity that actually manufacturers the referenced part
Notes and Instructions: Required
Data Type: Alphanumeric (5)

Field Name: Manufacturer's Address
Definition: The physical address of the part's manufacturer, including country
Notes and Instructions: Required
Data Type: Alphanumeric

Field Name: Manufacturer's Website
Definition: The web address of the part's manufacturer
Notes and Instructions: Required when the manufacturer has a website
Data Type: Alphanumeric

Field Name: Manufacturer's Facility Clearance Level
Definition: The level of security clearance the manufacturer's facility holds
Notes and Instructions: Required
Data Type: Alphanumeric (None, Confidential, Secret, Top Secret)

Field Name: Alternate For
Definition: The OEM part number of the item the referenced part is the alternate for
Notes and Instructions: Required if the referenced part is an alternate to another pat in the BOM
Data Type: Alphanumeric

Field Name: Assembly Type
Definition: Identifies whether the item is Commercial Off the Shelf (COTS), Non-Developmental Item (NDI), or Developmental Item (DI)
Notes and Instructions: Required if the part is an assembly considered COTS, NDI, or DI. See the definitions section of 48 CFR 2.101 for definitions.
Data Type: Alphanumeric (COTS, NDI, or DI)

Field Name: Batteries
Definition: Indicates whether an item contains batteries
Notes and Instructions: Required. If the referenced part contains batteries and is a subassembly, its NHA should indicate that it also contains batteries
Data Type: Yes / No

Field Name: Service Bulletin Applicability
Definition: Information required to subscribe to service bulletin updates to the part's software or hardware
Notes and Instructions: Required if the part will have service bulletins issued against it
Data Type: Alphanumeric

preparation_instructions.title: Media Requirement: The BOM shall be provided as an electronically editable, machine-readable, Comma Separated Values (CSV) text file with alphanumeric fields enclosed in double quotation marks.

figures.caption: FIGURE - 1 Table 1: Field Definitions and Instructions
